questions.question:
A Deployment named `meta-api` in namespace `downwardapi-lab` is not starting with the intended Downward API environment wiring.

Fix the Deployment so that:
- the first environment variable is named `POD_NAME` and uses `metadata.name`
- the second environment variable is named `POD_NAMESPACE` and uses `metadata.namespace`
- the container image remains `busybox:1.36`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container can print both corrected environment values

Do not replace the workload with a one-off Pod. Fix the Deployment manifest.

verification.description: Deployment meta-api uses the intended Downward API env names and fieldRef paths
Deployment meta-api becomes Available after the env wiring is repaired
The running container prints the expected POD_NAME and POD_NAMESPACE values
